description.from:
# API Guide
This is a Api alpha-server for GloView App.

## Common Rules
- 인증이 필요한 API는 `Authorization: Bearer {id_token}` 헤더를 포함해야 합니다.

## CDN Guide
- CDN URL 형식: `https://{cdn_host}/{path}`
    - cdn_host: `dev-cdn.call-shot.com`
- Original URL path: `/origin/{file_path}`
    - ex: https://dev-cdn.call-shot.com/origin/times_square.jpg
- Thumbnail URL path: /thumb/{file_path}?w={size}
    - Thumbnail URL의 경우 QueryString 없이 내려감
    - size: 썸네일 크기
    - ex: https://dev-cdn.call-shot.com/thumb/callshot/times_square.jpg?w=200
description.to:
# API Guide
This is a Api alpha-server for CallShot App.

## Common Rules
- 인증이 필요한 API는 `Authorization: Bearer {id_token}` 헤더를 포함해야 합니다.

## CDN Guide
- CDN URL 형식: `https://{cdn_host}/{path}`
    - cdn_host: `dev-cdn.call-shot.com`
- Original URL path: `/origin/{file_path}`
    - ex: https://dev-cdn.call-shot.com/origin/times_square.jpg
- Thumbnail URL path: /thumb/{file_path}?w={size}
    - Thumbnail URL의 경우 QueryString 없이 내려감
    - size: 썸네일 크기
    - ex: https://dev-cdn.call-shot.com/thumb/callshot/times_square.jpg?w=200

description.from: 지정된 클러스터 영역(중심점 + 반지름) 내의 모든 사진을 조회합니다.
description.to: 지정된 영역(BoundingBox) 내의 사진 목록을 정렬 기준에 따라 조회합니다.
지도에 표시할 사진 클러스터를 조회합니다. BoundingBox와 zoomLevel 기반으로 tile 클러스터링합니다.

changelog.text: added the new required 'query' request parameter 'boundingBox'
added the new required 'query' request parameter 'boundingBox'

changelog.comment: This is a warning because some apps may return an error when receiving a parameter that they do not expect. It is recommended to deprecate the parameter first.
This is a warning because some apps may return an error when receiving a parameter that they do not expect. It is recommended to deprecate the parameter first.

api operation id 'deletePublishedPhoto_1' removed and replaced with 'deletePublishedPhoto'
api operation id 'getPublishedPhoto_1' removed and replaced with 'getPublishedPhoto'
api operation id 'updatePublishedPhoto_1' removed and replaced with 'updatePublishedPhoto'
added the optional property 'body/shutter' to the response with the '200' status
added the new optional 'query' request parameter 'size'
added the new optional 'query' request parameter 'sort'
added the new optional 'query' request parameter 'zoomLevel'
added the optional property 'body' to the response with the '200' status
added the optional property 'body' to the response with the '200' status

breaking.text: added the new required 'query' request parameter 'boundingBox'
added the new required 'query' request parameter 'boundingBox'

breaking.comment: This is a warning because some apps may return an error when receiving a parameter that they do not expect. It is recommended to deprecate the parameter first.
